action.description: Carboplatin may be added as part of a neoadjuvant TNBC regimen after weighing potential benefits and harms.

documentation.citation: Carboplatin may be offered in TNBC to increase the likelihood of pathologic complete response after balancing benefits and harms. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 3.3
documentation.label: claim-r3-3

action.title: Consider carboplatin to increase pathologic complete response

description: Choose neoadjuvant chemotherapy strategy for triple-negative breast cancer.
